_README: Example project-config.json for an investigative-journalism workflow. All names and entities below are FICTIONAL. Copy this file to system/project-config.json to run the journalism example.

contacts._doc: The reporter's own canonical entry. Outbound correspondence is attributed to this slug.

contacts.role: Anonymous source inside Halverton city government
contacts.notes: Anonymous. Tipped off the reporter to bid-window timing irregularities. Refer to as Source Alpha in published work; never name.

contacts.role: Former employee of Civic Vector Inc., now a private contractor
contacts.notes: Willing to speak on background. Has direct knowledge of the procurement process.

contacts.role: Official spokesperson for the company under investigation

scope_rules._doc: Patterns used by classify_scope.py. A message is in_scope if any pattern matches. For this example, the scope is anything mentioning Civic Vector or the Halverton procurement process.

headline_open_items: Confirm bid-window dates against Halverton city council minutes
Obtain unredacted bid responses from RFP-2025-014
Reach Civic Vector's CEO for on-record comment
Verify former-engineer source's claims via second source

capture._doc: Offline-friendly default: local_mbox reads the bundled fictional .mbox under examples/. Switch provider to 'gmail_imap' or 'yahoo_browser' once you want to ingest your own live mail. To use a folder of .eml files instead of a single .mbox, drop 'mbox_path' and set 'eml_dir' to the folder path.
